case.title: FELLOM v. REDEVELOPMENT AGY., CITY & CTY., SAN FRANCISCO

opinion.h4: FELLOM v. REDEVELOPMENT AGY., CITY & CTY., SAN FRANCISCO, (1958)
opinion.h2: FELLOM ET AL. v. REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, FIRST APPELLATE
opinion.p: No. 323. Decided October 27, 1958. Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Dion R. Holm and George E. Baglin for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
